name: sidequest-atlas
description: Sidequest Atlas — the life and field notes of Shen Ruililin

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@sidequest-atlas/domain && npm run build --workspace=@sidequest-atlas/content && npm run build --workspace=@sidequest-atlas/intelligence && npm run build --workspace=@sidequest-atlas/exporters && npm run build --workspace=@sidequest-atlas/cli && npm run build --workspace=@sidequest-atlas/web
